name: clock
description: Digital clock showing current time and date
css: #clock-widget { height:100%; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center; } #clock-widget .clock-time { font-size:clamp(2rem,16cqi,5rem); font-weight:700; color:var(--fg-bright,#fff); letter-spacing:0.05em; text-shadow:0 0 20px var(--accent,#0066ff); } #clock-widget .clock-date { font-size:clamp(0.8rem,4.8cqi,1.4rem); color:var(--fg-dim,#888); margin-top:0.3em; letter-spacing:0.1em; }
